meta.title: HBT — Handmade Brazilian Tobacco
meta.description: Handcrafted Brazilian tobacco with European restraint. Handcrafted in Brazil.

hero.lede: Black as structure. White as voice. A house of handmade tobacco born in Brazil, dressed in European elegance.

feature.body: HBT joins the sector's largest international fair with its special series — matte black packaging, white typography, an edition conceived for Dortmund. The Brazilian soul under the European spotlight.

marca.title: Handmade, in Brazil.
marca.body1: Every leaf is selected, cured and worked by hands that know the craft. HBT is born where fine Brazilian tobacco meets the aesthetic of a luxury house: restrained, silent, precise.
marca.body2: We don't sell noise. We sell origin — and the care that only handmade work carries.

serie.body1: The special series HBT presents in Dortmund. Matte black packaging, white letters, no gloss — because gloss reads as plastic, and matte reads as premium.
serie.body2: A limited edition, conceived for collectors and for those who understand the gesture of origin behind each piece.

exp.title: See. Feel. Hear.
exp.vision: Matte black and pure white. The eye goes straight to the light.
exp.aroma: A woody-amber family: fine tobacco, vanilla, leather and a touch of Brazilian cumaru.
exp.sound: Classic bossa nova, in a lounge mood. Elegance you can hear.

footer.legal: Intended exclusively for adults over 18. This site is institutional in nature and does not encourage tobacco consumption.

soon.text: This page is in preparation. Official content will be published soon.
